overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a Star Wars game featuring a female protagonist exploring a frontier settlement on an alien planet. The character walks past a massive ancient tree and through a dusty settlement with domed metallic buildings, encountering a speeder bike and NPCs along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient tree plaza at settlement entrance

events.description: character looks up at the ancient tree while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking toward the massive ancient tree with a small droid companion following behind

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches
buildings built into the rocky cliff face
reddish dirt trail leading through the settlement

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path toward a massive ancient tree on the right, with cliffside structures visible on the left. At around 4 seconds, the camera tilts up to admire the tree's sprawling branches against the blue sky before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open settlement approach with domed buildings

events.description: speeder bike with rider passes from right to left across the path

agents.ego_description: jogging through the open dirt area toward the domed buildings in the distance

notable_agents.action: speeder bike flying low across the path from right to left

entered.detail: large circular metallic building with domed roof
stacked sandbags forming a defensive barrier

segments.scene_description: The character moves through open terrain toward a large domed building in the center. Around 20 seconds, a speeder bike suddenly passes from right to left in front of the character. The ancient tree falls behind as the settlement buildings grow larger.

events.description: character turns right to circle around the large domed building

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance and turning right to circle around the structure

notable_agents.action: two figures standing guard near the metal gate entrance

entered.detail: large circular metal gate with grid pattern
fabric canopy extending from the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the entrance of the domed building where two NPCs stand near a metal gate. The character turns right to go around the building, passing under a fabric canopy. The building wall dominates the left side as the path curves.

agents.ego_description: walking past the vibrant red rock formation toward the distant settlement center

entered.detail: large rock outcrop with striking red and orange striations
multi-level white building built into the hillside

segments.scene_description: Having rounded the domed building, the character walks along a path with a striking red rock formation on the left. A multi-level terraced building is visible on the left hillside as the character heads toward the settlement center in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow path beside the cylindrical building wall

entered.detail: large curved concrete structure with weathered surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow path with a large cylindrical building wall on the right. The red rock formation falls behind as the character continues deeper into the settlement, with the terraced building now closer on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a natural wilderness into the heart of a dusty frontier settlement. It begins along a dirt path beside cliffside structures, tilting upward to capture the sprawling branches of a massive ancient tree against a blue sky before moving forward into open terrain. As the tree recedes, the camera approaches a large domed building while a speeder bike streaks across the path from right to left. The scene then shifts toward the building's entrance where NPCs stand by a metal gate, before the camera curves right under a fabric canopy and follows a path flanked by a striking red rock formation and a multi-level terraced hillside. Finally, the red rocks fall behind as the camera glides past a large cylindrical wall, pushing deeper into the settlement toward the distant center.
